{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mantle of Ozriel
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Mantle of Ozriel]] is a cape of shadow.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Mantle of Ozriel]] was sealed in [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
